# getIDDataElement()

**Instance Method**

Returns the data element representing the attribute ID for the target service attribute.

## Declaration

```swift
func getIDDataElement() -> IOBluetoothSDPDataElement!
```

## Return Value

Returns the data element representing the attribute ID for the target service attribute.
